examTitle: A2 Reading and Use of English Mock Exam: Shopping & Fashion

parts.title: Part 1: Multiple-Choice Reading on Shopping
parts.content: Shopping is a big part of our lives. People buy clothes, food, and other things they need. Some people like shopping because it's fun. Others don't like shopping because it takes a long time. We can shop at the supermarket, a store, or online. When we shop online, we can see the prices and descriptions of the products. If we want to buy something, we can click the 'buy now' button.
parts.instructions: Read the text and answer the questions. For each question, choose the correct answer A, B or C.

questions.question: Why do some people like shopping?
questions.explanation: The text states that some people like shopping because it's fun. This is a good reason for enjoying an activity.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the reasons why people like or dislike shopping.

questions.question: Where can we shop?
options: C. At the supermarket, a store, or online
questions.correctOption: C. At the supermarket, a store, or online
questions.explanation: The text states that we can shop at the supermarket, a store, or online. This is a good answer because it includes all the options.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the places where we can shop.

questions.question: What do we do when we shop online?
options: A. We can't see the prices and descriptions
B. We can see the prices and descriptions, and click the 'buy now' button
C. We have to call the store
questions.correctOption: B. We can see the prices and descriptions, and click the 'buy now' button
questions.explanation: The text states that when we shop online, we can see the prices and descriptions of the products, and click the 'buy now' button. This is a good answer because it includes the correct actions.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the actions we take when we shop online.

parts.title: Part 2: Matching - Shopping Descriptions
content: Sarah likes buying clothes from her favourite store.
Emily likes shopping online because it's faster.
Tom likes going to the supermarket because it's cheaper.
David likes shopping with his friends because it's fun.
parts.instructions: Read the descriptions of the people. Choose the best option (A-H) for each person.

questions.question: Which person likes buying clothes from her favourite store?
questions.explanation: The text states that Sarah likes buying clothes from her favourite store. This is a good answer because it matches the description.
questions.tips: Read the descriptions carefully and look for the person who likes buying clothes from her favourite store.

questions.question: Which person likes shopping online because it's faster?
questions.explanation: The text states that Emily likes shopping online because it's faster. This is a good answer because it matches the description.
questions.tips: Read the descriptions carefully and look for the person who likes shopping online because it's faster.

questions.question: Which person likes going to the supermarket because it's cheaper?
questions.explanation: The text states that Tom likes going to the supermarket because it's cheaper. This is a good answer because it matches the description.
questions.tips: Read the descriptions carefully and look for the person who likes going to the supermarket because it's cheaper.

parts.title: Part 3: Multiple-Choice for Short Texts/SIGNS - Fashion Labels
content: New Arrival: Fashionable Clothes for Men and Women
Closed: We are closed on Sunday
Returns: You can return items within 30 days
parts.instructions: Read the texts and short messages. For each question, choose the correct answer A, B or C.

questions.question: What is the discount for all items?
questions.explanation: The text states that the price is 20% off all items. This is a good answer because it includes the correct discount.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the discount for all items.

questions.question: What is the sale for all shoes?
questions.explanation: The text states that the sale is 50% off all shoes. This is a good answer because it includes the correct sale.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the sale for all shoes.

questions.question: When are we closed?
questions.explanation: The text states that we are closed on Sunday. This is a good answer because it includes the correct day.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the day when we are closed.

parts.title: Part 4: Multiple-Choice Gap-Fill - Shopping Vocabulary
parts.content: When we go to the supermarket, we look at the _______________ (1) _______ on the shelves. We can find bread, milk, and other _______________ (2) _______. Some supermarkets have a _______________ (3) _______ section where we can find healthy food. If we want to buy something, we can take it to the _______________ (4) _______ and pay for it. If we don't want it, we can put it back on the _______________ (5) _______. We can also buy _______________ (6) _______ online and have it delivered to our home.
parts.instructions: Read the text. Choose the best word (A, B or C) for each gap.

questions.question: Gap 1
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'labels' because the text states that we look at the labels on the shelves.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the word that completes the sentence.

questions.question: Gap 2
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'food' because the text states that we can find bread, milk, and other food on the shelves.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the word that completes the sentence.

questions.question: Gap 3
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'healthy' because the text states that some supermarkets have a healthy food section.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the word that completes the sentence.

parts.title: Part 5: Open Gap-Fill - Shopping Vocabulary
parts.content: When we go to the supermarket, we look at the _______________ (1) _______ on the shelves. We can find _______________ (2) _______, _______________ (3) _______, and other _______________ (4) _______. Some supermarkets have a _______________ (5) _______ section where we can find _______________ (6) _______. If we want to buy something, we can take it to the _______________ (7) _______ and pay for it.
parts.instructions: Read the text. Write ONE word for each gap.

questions.question: Gap 1
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'labels' because the text states that we look at the labels on the shelves.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the word that completes the sentence.

questions.question: Gap 2
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'food' because the text states that we can find bread, milk, and other food on the shelves.
questions.tips: Read the text carefully and look for the word that completes the sentence.
